top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says the world of tech investing has changed and it's not going back
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said semiconductor and AI infrastructure stocks have replaced software as the market's technology leaders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Peckham could do with some Del Boy graft
top_signals.summary: Peckham’s most famous son, Del Boy, once observed that “He who dares, wins” – adding “He who hesitates, don’t.” It’s a motto on which Southwark Council would do well to reflect, considering there are more than 22,000 people on the borough’s social housing waiting list. Southwark’s Liberal Democrats point out it will take the council [...]

top_signals.title: Why the Trump-Xi summit ended in an impasse
top_signals.summary: Given Xi's reluctance to address Trump's Iran concerns, he should be unsurprised that the U.S. has not fully endorsed his new framework for U.S.-China relations.

top_signals.title: Exploit released for new PinTheft Arch Linux root escalation flaw
top_signals.summary: PinTheft, a recently patched Linux privilege escalation vulnerability, now has a publicly available proof-of-concept (PoC) exploit that allows local attackers to gain root privileges on Arch Linux systems. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Dodgers’ Shohei Ohtani delivers on mound and at plate in win over Padres
top_signals.summary: Ohtani (4-2) gave up three hits and walked two while striking out four in an 88-pitch effort.
